'''chahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cacophonically|cacophonically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cacophonically|cacophonically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chahate|chahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chahatesher|chahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahatesherĂ«m|chahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chahatero|chahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chahateshĂ«|chahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahateshĂ«m|chahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichahatero|gokichahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichahateshĂ«|gokichahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahateshĂ«m|gokichahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochahankerom|gochahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochahankeshĂ«|gochahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahankeshĂ«m|gochahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochahankeya|gochahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chahaterom|chahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahatemu|chahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chahateya|chahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichahaterom|gokichahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahatemu|gokichahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichahateya|gokichahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chahahate|chahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chahahatesher|chahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahahatesherĂ«m|chahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chahahatero|chahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chahahateshĂ«|chahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahahateshĂ«m|chahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichahahatero|gokichahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichahahateshĂ«|gokichahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahahateshĂ«m|gokichahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochahahankerom|gochahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochahahankeshĂ«|gochahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahahankeshĂ«m|gochahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochahahankeya|gochahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chahahaterom|chahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahahatemu|chahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chahahateya|chahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichahahaterom|gokichahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahahatemu|gokichahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichahahateya|gokichahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠte|chĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠtesher|chĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠtero|chĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠtero|gokichĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠterom|chĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠtemu|chĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠhĂŠteya|chĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠterom|gokichĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠhĂŠteya|gokichĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafhafte|chafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafhaftesher|chafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafhaftesherĂ«m|chafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafhaftero|chafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafhafteshĂ«|chafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafhafteshĂ«m|chafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafhaftero|gokichafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafhafteshĂ«|gokichafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafhafteshĂ«m|gokichafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafhafnkerom|gochafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafhafnkeshĂ«|gochafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafhafnkeshĂ«m|gochafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafhafnkeya|gochafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafhafterom|chafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafhaftemu|chafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafhafteya|chafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafhafterom|gokichafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafhaftemu|gokichafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafhafteya|gokichafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
